_TODO_accountAssociation: REQUIRED BEFORE PUBLISHING — see README 'Go live' checklist. Generate the signed {header,payload,signature} object with the domain owner's Farcaster custody key via the Warpcast Mini App Manifest Tool (https://farcaster.xyz/~/developers/mini-apps/manifest), then replace this key with a real 'accountAssociation' object. It cannot be generated by anyone but the account owner; do not fake it.

miniapp.name: Launcher Launcher
miniapp.subtitle: Every pair is $HOODIE
miniapp.description: Spin up your own token launcher on Robinhood Chain. Every token it launches is paired with $HOODIE - locked at the contract level.
